squads.name: Omnis
squads.description: Router squad (default for new chats): hands each request to the squad best suited to handle it. Leaderless — the Omnis agent runs directly and only routes.

squads.name: Default
squads.description: General-purpose coordinator with the full team available.

squads.name: Skill Editor
squads.description: Skill editing focus: Skill editor plus the web agent for research and reference retrieval, and the Helper for sourcing existing skills and answering questions about yoke.

squads.name: Helper
squads.description: Answers questions about yoke and its capabilities, and finds/inspects/installs registry items (skills, agents, MCP servers, squads, A2A peers, commands) on demand. Use this whenever the user asks whether an agent/skill/tool/MCP server exists for a task (even a specialised one like Flux CD or Kubernetes), wants to discover or install one, or asks what yoke can do or how it works. Leaderless: the Helper agent runs directly, limited to its own docs + registries tools.
